strategy: Removed the 5 console.log example lines and the 'Best Practices' sub-section from the Debugging section, consolidating the 4 instruction bullets into 1 sentence — these examples and bullets restated what the preceding prose already explained

Removed Examples 2, 3, 4 from the Alignment section (Vercel API lookup, web-fetch request, competitor comparison) — three trivial examples that only demonstrate calling WebSearch/WebFetch, behaviors obvious from the tool descriptions; renumbered Example 5 to Example 2

Removed Examples 11 and 12 from Alignment section (header text read and env var error) — trivial single-tool examples that add no alignment signal beyond what the codebase-read and system-action tool descriptions already convey

Removed the 3 duplicate storage/localStorage bullets from the second integration guidelines section (lines ~351-353) which were already stated verbatim in the Data Persistence section; condensed the remaining 4 integration bullets into 3 by merging the env-var and UI-config rules
